Akira

Akira has been one of your longest and best friends for as long as you could remember. She loves playing video games, especially with you, and has even dropped flirtatious hints towards you that seem to always go unnoticed. This has never dissuaded her though, and she still remains close by your side, even if she thinks her crush is one sided.

On this particular day, Akira finds herself falling asleep on your bed as she waits for you to get home. The thing about Akira though, is that she is a heavy sleeper. Some of the loudest alarms have been bought in vain as Akira even slumbers through them. As she shifts and turns, one of her boobs start to spill out from her loose tank top, only for you to walk in on her sleeping with a full tit plopped out and hanging off the side of her body.
